h1: Enhance Your Fireplace Makeover with a Gas Insert
h2: Dark Blue Fireplace In The Bedroom? Yes, Please!

paragraphs: Renovating a home is a journey filled with decisions - big and small - that shape the final outcome. For The LKS Address, a popular influencer couple known for their home renovation projects, upgrading the fireplace in their 90s colonial home was a pivotal moment in their makeover journey. Their choice? The Supreme indoor gas fireplace insert from Heat & Glo.

The LKS Address decided to transform their traditional wood-burning fireplace into a modern gas insert, opting for Heat & Glo's Supreme indoor gas fireplace insert. This decision was driven by their desire for a more efficient, convenient, and aesthetically pleasing fireplace solution. The gas insert offered several key features that made it an ideal choice for their home:

Reflecting on their decision, The LKS Address shared their thoughts on the transformation:“We upgraded our existing wood burning fireplace to a Heat & Glo gas fireplace insert. With our wood-burning fireplace, it was smelly, required a lot of work and cleanup to get a fire going, and make sure it was properly put out. Now, with our insert, we can get a fire with the click of a button from our remote. This is a really convenient way to have a fire because there are no smells, no cleanup, and not to mention we love how the insert completes our fireplace surround. Now we’ll go from using our wood-burning fireplace probably once every few years to using our gas fireplace insert year-round and likely every day in the winter thanks to Heat & Glo.”
The Benefits of Upgrading to a Gas Insert
The transformation from a wood-burning fireplace to a gas insert brought numerous benefits to The LKS Address:
A Modern Fireplace for a Modern Home

The LKS Address's choice to upgrade their fireplace with Heat & Glo’s Supreme Indoor Gas Fireplace Insert exemplifies how modern technology can enhance traditional home features. Their 90s colonial home now boasts a fireplace that not only provides warmth and comfort but also aligns with their busy lifestyle and design preferences. This makeover is a testament to the impact of choosing the right home improvement products and the value they bring to daily living.

For those considering a fireplace upgrade, the experience of The LKS Address highlights the advantages of modern gas inserts and request a consult today. With Heat & Glo, homeowners can enjoy the beauty and warmth of a fireplace without the drawbacks of traditional wood-burning systems.
